_about: Phase 1 parity checks. Each check compares a source-of-truth WEB value (or VLM-extracted value) against the app's backend API and/or what the app actually renders. The classifier explains WHY a check passed or failed. Edit these for your app: set real web.url/selector, api.endpoint/json_path, and app_targets[].goal/label.

app_targets.goal: Navigate to the markets or prices screen and read the current Bitcoin (BTC) price
app_targets.label: BTC price

app_targets.goal: Open the app's Settings or About screen and read the app version number
app_targets.label: app version
